summary: Mercedes' Kimi Antonelli arrives at Silverstone in commanding form, having seized pole position and sprint victory ahead of a record 180,000-strong home crowd hungry for a British winner. Ferrari's Charles Leclerc and Lewis Hamilton lurk close enough to threaten, while Ollie Bearman's return to his home circuit adds intrigue to the midfield battle. A dominant display from Antonelli on Sunday would signal a genuine title threat from the young Mercedes driver and reshape the championship narrative heading into the summer break.
